data.title: What the Options Market Tells Us About PayPal Holdings
Similarweb Analyst Initiates Coverage, Praises Tel Firm For 'Rapidly Improving Profitability'
data.description: Similarweb revenue growth is accelerating and profitability improving. Analyst initiates coverage with Buy rating.

data.title: Federal Court Orders Alaska Airlines To Rehire Mechanic Fired Over Cannabis
data.description: Federal court orders Alaska Airlines to rehire worker fired for THC test, reflecting the tension between cannabis laws and employer policies.

data.title: Viad Shakes Things Up With $535M GES Sale, Rebranding Ahead
data.description: Viad Corp sells GES business to Truelink Capital for $535 million. Proceeds used to retire 2021 Credit Facility. Pursuit to rebrand as PRSU.

data.title: American Airlines Set To Report Q3 Earnings: Key Factors To Watch
data.description: American Airlines shares are trading lower by 1.7% during Monday's session. Traders and investors are watching for the company's Q3 earnings report.
